title: Better Compass
description: Display your coordinates and cardinal direction by holding a compass. It also allows you to share your location in chat with a short command.
body:
![Better Compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61fb125203b6e640f64c9c5105fd0330e07034d6.jpeg)

# **Better Compass**

**Display coordinates and cardinal direction!**

Easily get your current coordinates and facing direction by holding a compass. Share your location in chat to your friend with a single command!

# 🪄Introduction
## What is Better Compass?

This data pack provides a light alternative to the F3 screen, that covers almost all of the window. Holding a regular **compass** in main hand or off hand displays your coordinates and cardinal direction in the action bar.

# 🧰 Commands

Any player, no matter they are operator or not, can use this command to quickly share their coordinates and their current dimension it is in chat:
```
/trigger my.pos
```

# 🧹 Uninstall

Better Compass comes with an automatic uninstallation process. Running it will:
- Remove all scores and storage specific to the Better Compass data pack
- If there is no more KawaMood data packs installed, also remove all common scores and storages

The command to start the uninstalling process is the following one: 
```
/function pk_be_co:cmd/uninstall
```

# 🪠 Report an issue

If you encountered an issue with this data pack, preferably join the [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/w8s9XWgN6v), and open a post in the dedicated **#data-pack-issues** channel to describe your problem. Please, don't forget to provide all necessary informations including:
- The Minecraft version you're using.
- The version of the concerned data pack you're using.
- If you're using any modified version like Forge, Paper or Spigot.
- If you do, the plugins or mods you're using that may alter the functioning of data packs.
- The list of other data packs you're using, if you have others.
- A clear description of your issue, and a way to reproduce it.
- If necessary, a video or a screenshot of the issue in game.

# 📌 Other links

Thank you for using Better Compass! It makes me happy to know people are enjoying it.
If you want to support its development and the development of other data packs, you can support me on my other social networks:
